heading: Short title
label: 6001 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Educational Research, Development, Dissemination, and Improvement Act of 1994”.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IX of , , , which enacted this subchapter, amended sections 2422, 3155, 3412, 3419, 3462, and 4085b of this title, repealed , and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 1221e and 3155 of this title.Pub. L. 103–227108 Stat. 212section 1221e of this titleMar. 31, 1994
